name: I2C Peripheral Scanner (Boot Manifest)
description: Scans all 127 I2C addresses at boot, identifies 40+ known sensors by address (BME280, MPU6050, SSD1306, AHT20, etc.), and generates a HardwareManifest JSON. Pipe to BLE characteristic 0xFF01 for auto-detection by Parakram app. Based on hraHoo/I2C-scanner + romkey/ESP-Diagnostic-Tool.
